content:
[{'text': 'Good. The robot is on white space, facing east (right), and all sectors are CLEAR. 

Looking at the map:
- Robot is in the **middle white corridor**, near the left side, facing right (east)
- Green destination is in the **upper white corridor**, near the right side
- There appears to be a gap/opening in the black wall between the corridors on the right side (I can see a small gap near x≈320, y≈130 in the image)

I need to move **right (east)** along the middle corridor to find the passage going up. The robot is already facing east, so let me move forward.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01PsCM84aNm8ztLybvFSg3jS', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
